name: Hot Seafood and Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces canned cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, egg, soup, pepper, onion, and water chestnuts. Mix gently.
3. Add crab, shrimp, and potatoes to the bowl; mix well.
4. Transfer mixture to an 8 x 8-inch baking pan.
5. Combine bread crumbs and melted butter in a separate small bowl.
6. Sprinkle the crumb-butter mixture over the seafood salad.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
